scenario.title: The Feature Architect
scenario.context: You're adding an AI-powered feature to an existing web application. Before writing code, you need to plan the architecture including where AI fits, what APIs are needed, and how components interact.
scenario.goal: Write a prompt that designs the architecture for an AI feature, including system components, data flow, and integration points.
constraints: Map data flow from user action to AI to response
Consider caching, rate limiting, and fallbacks
scenario.exampleInput: Add AI-powered search to e-commerce site. User types query → AI understands intent and extracts filters → search executes → AI ranks and explains results. Must handle 1000 req/min, respond in <2s.
hints: Trace a request through the entire system

scoringGuide.excellent: All components with responsibilities and interfaces

rubric.name: Data Flow
rubric.description: Is the data flow mapped end-to-end?

scoringGuide.excellent: Complete flow with data shapes at each step

evaluatorContext.idealResponse:
Design the architecture for AI-powered e-commerce search:

ARCHITECTURE: AI-Enhanced Product Search

---

SYSTEM OVERVIEW:

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                      Client (Browser)                        │
└─────────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────────┘
                          │ HTTP
┌─────────────────────────▼───────────────────────────────────┐
│                    API Gateway                               │
│              (Rate Limiting, Auth, Routing)                  │
└─────────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────────┘
                          │
┌─────────────────────────▼───────────────────────────────────┐
│                   Search Service                             │
│  ┌─────────────┐  ┌─────────────┐  ┌─────────────────────┐  │
│  │Query Parser │→ │AI Enhancer  │→ │Search Executor      │  │
│  │             │  │             │  │                     │  │
│  └─────────────┘  └──────┬──────┘  └─────────┬───────────┘  │
│                          │                    │              │
│                   ┌──────▼──────┐      ┌─────▼─────┐       │
│                   │Claude API   │      │Elasticsearch│      │
│                   │(Intent/NLU) │      │(Products)   │      │
│                   └─────────────┘      └───────────┘       │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

COMPONENT SPECIFICATIONS:

```json
{
  "components": [
    {
      "name": "API Gateway",
      "responsibility": "Entry point, rate limiting, authentication, request routing",
      "technology": "Kong / AWS API Gateway",
      "config": {
        "rate_limit": "1000 req/min per user",
        "global_limit": "10000 req/min",
        "auth": "JWT validation",
        "timeout": "5s"
      }
    },
    {
      "name": "Query Parser",
      "responsibility": "Parse raw query, extract explicit filters, sanitize input",
      "technology": "Node.js service",
      "latency_budget": "50ms",
      "caching": "LRU cache for common queries"
    },
    {
      "name": "AI Enhancer",
      "responsibility": "Understand intent, extract implicit filters, expand synonyms",
      "technology": "Claude API integration",
      "latency_budget": "800ms",
      "fallback": "Return parsed query without enhancement"
    },
    {
      "name": "Search Executor",
      "responsibility": "Build ES query, execute search, format results",
      "technology": "Elasticsearch client",
      "latency_budget": "300ms"
    },
    {
      "name": "Result Ranker",
      "responsibility": "AI-powered result ranking and explanation",
      "technology": "Optional Claude call for top results",
      "latency_budget": "500ms",
      "condition": "Only for <50 results, else skip"
    }
  ]
}
```

---

DATA FLOW:

```json
{
  "request_flow": [
    {
      "step": 1,
      "from": "Client",
      "to": "API Gateway",
      "data": {
        "method": "POST",
        "path": "/api/search",
        "body": {
          "query": "red running shoes under $100",
          "page": 1,
          "limit": 20
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "step": 2,
      "from": "API Gateway",
      "to": "Query Parser",
      "data": {
        "raw_query": "red running shoes under $100",
        "user_id": "user-123",
        "session_id": "sess-456"
      },
      "output": {
        "tokens": ["red", "running", "shoes"],
        "explicit_filters": {
          "price_max": 100
        },
        "needs_ai_enhancement": true
      }
    },
    {
      "step": 3,
      "from": "Query Parser",
      "to": "AI Enhancer",
      "data": {
        "parsed_query": "{{step_2_output}}",
        "context": {
          "user_history": ["viewed athletic wear"],
          "available_categories": ["footwear", "apparel"]
        }
      },
      "output": {
        "intent": "product_search",
        "enhanced_filters": {
          "category": "athletic_footwear",
          "color": "red",
          "use_case": "running",
          "price_range": {"max": 100}
        },
        "synonyms": ["sneakers", "trainers"],
        "confidence": 0.92
      }
    },
    {
      "step": 4,
      "from": "AI Enhancer",
      "to": "Search Executor",
      "data": {
        "elasticsearch_query": {
          "bool": {
            "must": [
              {"multi_match": {"query": "running shoes", "fields": ["name", "description"]}}
            ],
            "filter": [
              {"term": {"category": "athletic_footwear"}},
              {"term": {"color": "red"}},
              {"range": {"price": {"lte": 100}}}
            ]
          }
        }
      },
      "output": {
        "hits": [{"id": "prod-1", "name": "Nike Air Zoom", "price": 89.99}],
        "total": 45
      }
    }
  ]
}
```

---

API SPECIFICATION:

```yaml
openapi: 3.0.0
paths:
  /api/search:
    post:
      summary: AI-enhanced product search
      requestBody:
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [query]
              properties:
                query:
                  type: string
                  maxLength: 500
                page:
                  type: integer
                  default: 1
                limit:
                  type: integer
                  default: 20
                  maximum: 100
                filters:
                  type: object
                  description: Explicit filters to apply
      responses:
        200:
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  results:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      $ref: '#/components/schemas/Product'
                  total:
                    type: integer
                  ai_insights:
                    type: object
                    properties:
                      interpreted_query: string
                      applied_filters: object
                      suggestions: array
                  meta:
                    type: object
                    properties:
                      search_time_ms: integer
                      ai_enhanced: boolean
```

---

NON-FUNCTIONAL REQUIREMENTS:

```json
{
  "performance": {
    "target_latency_p95": "2000ms",
    "latency_budget": {
      "gateway": "50ms",
      "query_parser": "50ms",
      "ai_enhancer": "800ms",
      "search_executor": "300ms",
      "result_ranker": "500ms",
      "serialization": "100ms",
      "buffer": "200ms"
    }
  },
  "caching": {
    "query_cache": {
      "type": "Redis",
      "key": "hash(normalized_query + filters)",
      "ttl": "5min",
      "invalidation": "on product update"
    },
    "ai_enhancement_cache": {
      "type": "Redis",
      "key": "hash(raw_query)",
      "ttl": "1hour",
      "purpose": "Avoid repeated AI calls for same query"
    }
  },
  "fallbacks": {
    "ai_enhancer_timeout": {
      "threshold": "1000ms",
      "action": "use_basic_query_parser_output",
      "log": true
    },
    "ai_enhancer_error": {
      "action": "use_basic_query_parser_output",
      "alert_if_rate": ">5% in 5min"
    }
  },
  "rate_limiting": {
    "per_user": "100 req/min",
    "global": "10000 req/min",
    "ai_calls": "5000 req/min (cost control)"
  }
}
```
